buildCommand: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' https://api.groq.com; frame-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval' 'unsafe-inline';
